model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 fails on two fronts: it adds an extra word ('I') to the script, and more importantly, it completely ignores the 'fast pace' instruction, delivering the line in a slow, lethargic manner. Model 2 follows the script accurately and adopts a brisker, more urgent tone that aligns much better with the requested fast pace, even if it isn't extremely fast.
